ships.name: Disney Magic
ships.theme: Golden Age of Ocean Travel — classic Art Deco styling inspired by grand transatlantic liners
ships.signature_attraction: AquaDunk — a nearly vertical drop body slide that extends over the side of the ship

pool_deck.notes: Three pool areas across Deck 9 and 10; Goofy's Family Pool is the main family area, AquaLab and Nephews' Splash Zone are the kids water play areas, Quiet Cove Pool is adults-only

kids_clubs.oceaneer_club: Marvel Super Hero Academy, Star Wars: Millennium Falcon (themed lab-style play space for ages 3–10)
kids_clubs.oceaneer_lab: Merged with Oceaneer Club on this ship; shared open-plan space
kids_clubs.edge: Club for tweens ages 11–14 with lounges, gaming, social activities
kids_clubs.vibe: Teen-only space ages 14–17 with music, movies, and social events

stage_shows: Twice Charmed: An Original Twist on the Cinderella Story

ships.signature_attraction: Twist 'n' Spout — a double-looping yellow spiral slide (~250 ft) located within AquaLab; Wonder's signature water attraction

pool_deck.notes: Goofy's Family Pool is the main family area; AquaLab and Dory's Reef are the kids water play areas; Quiet Cove Pool is adults-only

ships.name: Disney Dream
ships.theme: Art Deco glamour — larger and grander than the Magic-class with a soaring atrium and golden accents
ships.signature_attraction: AquaDuck — first Disney Cruise Line watercoaster; a 765-ft tube coaster that extends over the ship's bow

pool_deck.notes: Donald's Family Pool is the main family pool; Mickey's Pool and Nemo's Reef are kids areas; Quiet Cove Pool is adults-only; Satellite Falls is an adults-only circular splash pool with rain curtain on Deck 13

kids_clubs.oceaneer_club: Star Wars: Jedi Training, Marvel Super Hero Academy, Pixar Play Zone — immersive themed rooms for ages 3–10
kids_clubs.oceaneer_lab: Separate open-plan STEM and creative activity space for ages 3–10
kids_clubs.vibe: Teen-only 14–17; private outdoor area, music, events

ships.name: Disney Wish
ships.theme: Fantasy and fairy tale — the ship is styled as a wish granted, with a grand staircase atrium inspired by Cinderella's enchanted world
ships.signature_attraction: AquaMouse — Disney Cruise Line's first Disney attraction at sea; a 760-ft story-driven water ride featuring Mickey and Minnie

pool_deck.notes: Three pools including Mickey and Friends Splash Zone for families; Luna, an adults-only rooftop pool; and the Quiet Cove adults-only pool area

kids_clubs.oceaneer_club: Worlds including Marvel Super Hero Academy, Star Wars: Path of the Jedi, Walt Disney Imagineering Lab, and Pixar Play Zone — for ages 3–10

ships.name: Disney Treasure
ships.theme: Adventure and exploration — inspired by Disney's tales of faraway lands and high-seas adventure, with a grand atrium styled after Adventureland and Treasure Island
ships.signature_attraction: AquaMouse — same story-driven water coaster as the Wish with updated Mickey and Minnie adventure theming

pool_deck.notes: Mickey and Friends Splash Zone family pool; adults-only Luna rooftop pool; Quiet Cove adults-only pool area

kids_clubs.oceaneer_club: Worlds including Marvel Super Hero Academy, Star Wars: Path of the Jedi, Walt Disney Imagineering Lab, and Pixar Play Zone

rotational_dining.theme: Celebrates the founding year of The Walt Disney Company — Walt side and Roy side dining rooms filled with movie memorabilia, posters, and sculptures. Upscale American menu.

rotational_dining.name: Worlds of Marvel
rotational_dining.theme: Cinematic Marvel dining experience — Guardians of the Galaxy show plays on screens during dinner. Menu inspired by Marvel film locations.

rotational_dining.name: Plaza de Coco
rotational_dining.theme: Inspired by Coco and Día de los Muertos — vibrant Mexican décor and cuisine. Two-night celebration with Miguel and the Mariachis on night one, full Día de los Muertos celebration on night two.

specialty_dining.description: Adults-only (18+) jazz-inspired supper club; The Aristocats theme; additional charge

bars_and_lounges.type: Haunted Mansion-themed cocktail lounge

Jungle Cruise Skipper Society bar activities

ships.name: Disney Destiny
ships.theme: Heroes and Villains — Disney's first ship themed around the full spectrum of heroes, villains, and anti-heroes from across the Disney universe. Black Panther Grand Hall, villain-inspired lounges throughout.
ships.signature_attraction: AquaMouse — villain-themed story water coaster. Also: Disney Uncharted Adventure shipwide interactive quest via Navigator app.

pool_deck.notes: Mickey and Friends Splash Zone family pool; Toy Story Splash Zone kids water play area; Quiet Cove adults-only pool. Triton-class pool decks run smaller than Dream-class — can feel crowded on sea days.

kids_clubs.oceaneer_club: Ages 3–10. Swirly slide entry. Tangled craft room, Beauty and the Beast library, villain invasion interactive storyline where kids help Black Panther defeat a villain. Character visits from Cruella de Vil, Loki, and Black Panther.
kids_clubs.vibe: Teens 14–17 — The Hideaway; private lounge with music, movies, social events
kids_clubs.nursery: It's a Small World Nursery for ages 6 months to 3 years

stage_shows: Disney Hercules — large-scale puppets (Hydra, Titans), told by the Muses. Includes 'Shooting Star' a song cut from the original 1997 film. Exclusive to Destiny.
Frozen: A Musical Spectacular — live retelling with puppets, projections, and snow effects.
Disney Seas the Adventure — embarkation night show, Captain Minnie sends Goofy on a journey through Disney and Pixar stories.

rotational_dining.theme: Tribute to Walt and Roy Disney's founding year. Movie memorabilia, posters, sculptures. Walt side and Roy side dining rooms. Upscale American menu — filet mignon, rack of lamb, roasted chicken, salmon.

rotational_dining.name: Worlds of Marvel
rotational_dining.theme: Guardians of the Galaxy 'Groot Remix' show plays on screens during dinner. Two-room Marvel experience. Menu inspired by Marvel film locations.

rotational_dining.name: Pride Lands: Feast of the Lion King
rotational_dining.theme: Dinner and live show exclusive to Destiny. Six performers and 23 African instruments retell Simba's story. Songs from all Lion King films, the Broadway production, and exclusive new song 'Serengeti Rain.' African-inspired cuisine with authentic spices, grains, and produce.

specialty_dining.name: Enchanté
specialty_dining.description: Adults-only (18+) French fine dining; significant upcharge

bars_and_lounges.name: De Vil's
bars_and_lounges.type: Cruella de Vil piano lounge — black, white and red décor, dalmatian-spotted piano, themed cocktails. Live music evenings. Interactive 'Treble-Making with Cruella' show.

bars_and_lounges.name: The Sanctum
bars_and_lounges.type: Doctor Strange themed lounge — mystical décor, Cloak of Levitation, circular mirror behind bar. Cocktails, mocktails, and coffee. Live music evenings.

bars_and_lounges.name: Cask & Cannon
bars_and_lounges.type: Pirates of the Caribbean pub — eclectic pirate décor, specialty and vintage rums, live sports.

bars_and_lounges.name: Haunted Mansion Parlor
bars_and_lounges.type: Gothic adults-only bar inspired by the Haunted Mansion attraction.

bars_and_lounges.name: The Rose
bars_and_lounges.type: Beauty and the Beast adults-only lounge on Deck 12 adjacent to Palo Steakhouse.

bars_and_lounges.name: Saga
bars_and_lounges.type: Wakanda-inspired 2-story entertainment space. Family activities by day, bar by night. Hosts trivia, karaoke, game shows.

bars_and_lounges.name: Café Megara
bars_and_lounges.type: Specialty coffee and cocktails inspired by Hercules character Megara.

bars_and_lounges.name: Café Merida
bars_and_lounges.type: Specialty coffee and cocktails inspired by Brave character Merida.

bars_and_lounges.name: Cove Café
bars_and_lounges.type: Adults-only coffee bar and lounge on Deck 12.

bars_and_lounges.name: Triton Lounge
bars_and_lounges.type: Casual all-ages lounge.

onboard_activities: Hero Zone — Incredibles-inspired recreation space on Deck 12 with sports court, playground, game floor, Incredi-Games competitions
Disney Uncharted Adventure — interactive shipwide quest via Navigator app
Haunted Mansion Happy Hunt — DisneyBand+ scavenger hunt
Bibbidi Bobbidi Boutique (becomes Pirates League on Pirate Night)
Hook's Barbery — barber shop and whisky bar
Untangled Salon — Rapunzel-inspired hair and nail salon
Pirate's Rockin' Parlay Party deck event with fireworks
Character meet-and-greets — Loki, Black Panther, Maleficent, Hades, Cruella de Vil, Dr. Facilier, Captain Jack Sparrow, Captain Hook, Oogie Boogie, Bruno
Treble-Making with Cruella — interactive live show in De Vil's
Dr. Facilier's Parlour — immersive villain meet and play experience
Wonderland Cinema and Never Land Cinema (2 screens)
Sounds of Wakanda live music experience

character_encounters.notes: Heroes and villains roster is the broadest villain/anti-hero lineup in the DCL fleet. Features extended 'meet and play' immersive experiences rather than traditional meet-and-greet lines for select characters.
